revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-3-185

Alternative term: Cradle

A shaped block used to steady and secure an object.


Note :

In Great-Britain, the term buoy chock refers to a chock shaped to fit a buoy body.

{{IALAFooter}}
